title: Count Binface: The intergalactic warrior who could upend Britain's strangest election
summary: Meet Count Binface: the challenger from another planet taking on Nigel Farage as questions over the Reform UK leader's finances overshadow his election comeback.

fullArticle:
Count Binface, a candidate in the Clacton-on-Sea by-election, poses for photographers at the Glastonbury Festival, Somerset, England, June 29, 2024.
                
                    
                    Scott A Garfitt/Invision/AP
                    
                
                hide caption

When Nigel Farage triggered a special election this week amid scrutiny over his finances, Britain's populist right-wing leader declared it a "people versus the establishment" election.

A longtime ally of President Donald Trump, Farage has built a political profile that extends well beyond Britain's borders. He was one of the leading figures behind the campaign to leave the European Union, known as Brexit, and has spent years presenting himself as an outsider in British politics.
